message:
fix(web): resolve scroll flickering and missing 3D sticks

Two critical bug fixes:

1. Scroll flickering on desktop Chrome:
   - Root cause: Trackpads send tiny horizontal deltas during vertical scrolling
   - These small deltaX values disabled the scroll blit optimization
   - Caused expensive full canvas redraws every frame → flickering/jank
   - Fix: Filter horizontal noise (<3px) during primarily vertical scrolls in
     VirtualScroller.handleWheel() and handleWheelDelta()
   - Also increased tryScrollBlit tolerance from 0.5px to 2px as defense in depth

2. Missing sticks in 3D ball-and-stick mode:
   - Root cause: includeBonds:'auto' skips bond detection for structures >15K atoms
   - Ball mode requires bonds to render sticks; they were silently empty
   - Fix: Force includeBonds:true when renderMode==='ball'
   - This triggers a refetch with bonds when user switches to ball mode

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
